violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Reachin cooler interior not properly maintained. Observed debris build up in bottoms of the upright cooler and in the upright freezer in kitchen. Observed cutting boards in kitchen beginning to discolor.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Fan guards storage shelving and pot rack in kitchen observed with debris build up.

FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Reachin cooler interior not properly maintained. Observed debris build up in bottoms of the pizza station cooler upright cooler in kitchen and in the prep top cooler in kitchen. Observed cutting boards in kitchen beginning to discolor.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Fan guards and storage shelving in kitchen observed with debris build up.
